name: cluster_20A_chrX
description: Drosophila piRNA-producing cluster: 20A — telomere-proximal piRNA cluster on X, targets HeT-A/TART/TAHRE telomeric retrotransposons.. Sequence content is essentially a transposon graveyard — dense, layered TE remnants 100-99% identical to active copies elsewhere. Reads here have many off-target placements at active TE insertion sites.
